title: Under drone fire, exiled Kurds wait to confront Iranian regime
summary_full: A group of fighters based in Iraq say they are "ready to go home", as they face drone attacks from Tehran.
summary_public: A group of fighters based in Iraq say they are "ready to go home", as they face drone attacks from Tehran.
